title: Comida, compras y preferencias
communication_goal: Usar comida, compras y preferencias en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to comida, compras y preferencias.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla comida, compras y preferencias mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.title: Food I like
lessons.objective: Nombrar alimentos y expresar gustos y preferencias básicas en inglés.

activities.prompt: Which word is a fruit?
activities.feedback_correct: Apple es una fruta.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el alimento que crece como fruta.

activities.prompt: I ___ pizza.
activities.feedback_correct: Con I usamos like.
activities.feedback_incorrect: El sujeto I usa la forma base like.

activities.prompt: She ___ vegetables.
activities.feedback_correct: Con she usamos likes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Añade s al verbo porque el sujeto es she.

activities.instruction: Une la comida con la categoría.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces alimentos cotidianos y sus categorías.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa qué tipo de alimento es cada palabra.

activities.prompt: My brother like rice, but he don't like fish.
activities.correct_answer: My brother likes rice, but he doesn't like fish.
activities.feedback_correct: Con he usamos likes y doesn't like.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa la tercera persona en afirmación y negación.

activities.prompt: I like fruit and vegetables. I love pasta, but I don't like spicy food.
activities.question: What does the speaker not like?
activities.feedback_correct: La frase negativa dice I don't like spicy food.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la última parte después de but.

activities.prompt: I like ___. I love ___. I don't like ___. My favorite food is ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Expresas tus preferencias con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica like y don't like como grupos completos.

activities.prompt: Daniel loves hamburgers and fries. He likes salad, but he does not like onions. His favorite drink is orange juice.
activities.question: What does Daniel not like?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice he does not like onions.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración con does not like.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about food you like, love, do not like, and hate. Include your favorite meal and drink.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes expresar preferencias alimentarias básicas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa I like, she likes y I don't like según el sujeto.

activities.instruction: Habla de comida con la IA.
activities.prompt: Meet the AI at a casual lunch. Discuss foods you like and dislike, ask about preferences, and choose a meal you both enjoy.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de gustos alimentarios y tomar una decisión juntos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA usa un menú visual y adapta el vocabulario a tus respuestas.

lessons.title: At the grocery store
lessons.objective: Pedir alimentos, preguntar precios y expresar cantidades básicas en una tienda.

activities.prompt: You want to know the price. What do you say?
activities.feedback_correct: How much is it? pregunta el precio.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la pregunta para saber cuánto cuesta algo.

activities.prompt: I'd like ___ apples, please.
activities.feedback_correct: Apples es contable y puede ir con un número.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una cantidad adecuada para un plural contable.

activities.prompt: Can I help you?
options: Yes, I'd like some bread, please.
activities.correct_answer: Yes, I'd like some bread, please.
activities.feedback_correct: Es una respuesta natural de compra.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una frase para pedir un producto.

activities.prompt: like / I'd / two / please / bananas
activities.feedback_correct: I'd like expresa un pedido cortés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con I'd like y termina con please.

activities.instruction: Une la frase con su función.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces frases frecuentes de una compra.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Identifica si la frase sirve para pedir, preguntar, ofrecer o terminar.

activities.prompt: Customer: I'd like two kilos of apples and a bottle of water, please. Clerk: Here you are. That is eight dollars.
activities.question: How much is the purchase?
activities.feedback_correct: The clerk says That is eight dollars.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la cantidad al final del diálogo.

activities.prompt: I'd like two apples and a bottle of water, please. How much is it? Thank you.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu pedido suena claro y cortés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Une I'd like y pronuncia las cantidades despacio pero sin separar cada palabra.

activities.prompt: Apples are two dollars a kilo. Milk is three dollars a carton. Bread is one dollar a loaf. Anna buys two kilos of apples and one loaf of bread.
activities.question: How much are the apples?
activities.feedback_correct: El precio aparece en la primera oración.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la información junto a apples.

activities.prompt: Write a shopping list with eight items, quantities, and one question about the price. Use polite request language.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu lista sirve para hacer una compra real.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Añade cantidades y usa I'd like para transformar la lista en pedidos.

activities.prompt: Shop for ingredients for dinner. Ask for eight items, quantities, prices, and one alternative when an item is unavailable.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes realizar una compra sencilla y resolver un problema.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA usa un inventario y te ofrece opciones para mantener la conversación.

lessons.title: At a restaurant
lessons.objective: Leer un menú, pedir una comida, hacer cambios sencillos y expresar preferencias en un restaurante.

activities.prompt: The waiter asks: Are you ready to order?
options: Yes, I'd like the chicken, please.
activities.correct_answer: Yes, I'd like the chicken, please.
activities.feedback_correct: Es una respuesta natural para pedir una comida.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una frase relacionada con ordenar comida.

activities.prompt: I'd like the soup, but ___ onions, please.
activities.feedback_correct: No onions expresa que no quieres cebolla.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la palabra para pedir que quiten un ingrediente.

activities.prompt: What would you like to drink?
activities.feedback_correct: La pregunta pide una bebida que quieres.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una respuesta con una bebida y I'd like.

activities.prompt: a / I'd / like / salad / please
activities.feedback_correct: I'd like + artículo + comida + please forma un pedido cortés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con I'd like y coloca please al final.

activities.instruction: Une la frase con su intención.

pairs.right: preguntar si el cliente está listo

activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces frases útiles de un restaurante.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Identifica si la frase sirve para ordenar, modificar o terminar la comida.

activities.prompt: Customer: I'd like the vegetable soup and grilled fish. No onions in the soup, please. Waiter: Would you like rice or potatoes? Customer: Potatoes, please.
activities.question: What does the customer want with the fish?
activities.feedback_correct: The customer chooses potatoes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la respuesta a rice or potatoes.

activities.prompt: I'd like the vegetable soup, please. No onions. Can I have some water? Thank you.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu pedido suena claro y cortés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica I'd like como una unidad y usa entonación amable.

activities.prompt: Today's menu: chicken with rice — $12; vegetable pasta — $10; tomato soup — $6; salad — $5; water — $2. The pasta includes cheese.
activities.question: Which meal costs six dollars?
activities.feedback_correct: Tomato soup cuesta $6.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el precio junto a tomato soup.

activities.prompt: Write a restaurant order with a main dish, a drink, one preference, and a request for the bill.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu pedido incluye toda la información necesaria.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa I'd like, no, please y Can I have...?

activities.instruction: Pide una comida con la IA.
activities.prompt: Order lunch from the AI. Ask about one menu item, request a change, choose a drink, and ask for the bill at the end.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes desenvolverte en un restaurante con peticiones claras.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra un menú y adapta las preguntas al vocabulario que dominas.

lessons.title: Plan a meal and shop
lessons.objective: Integrar preferencias, cantidades, compras y pedidos para planificar una comida completa.

activities.prompt: Which sentence is correct?
activities.feedback_correct: Rice es no contable y some funciona en un pedido.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa some con rice en lugar de un artículo o plural incorrecto.

activities.prompt: ___ apples do you need?
activities.feedback_correct: Apples es contable plural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa How many con alimentos que se pueden contar.

activities.prompt: Anything else?
activities.feedback_correct: Es una forma cortés de terminar una compra.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una respuesta para indicar que no necesitas más productos.

activities.prompt: I'd / like / two / sandwiches / and / some / juice
activities.correct_answer: I'd like two sandwiches and some juice.
activities.feedback_correct: Combinas un sustantivo contable con uno no contable correctamente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca I'd like al principio y separa two sandwiches de some juice.

activities.prompt: Customer: I like a coffee, please. Clerk: Do you want some sugar? Customer: Yes, a few sugar.
activities.correct_answer: Customer: I'd like a coffee, please. Clerk: Do you want some sugar? Customer: Yes, a little sugar.
activities.feedback_correct: Usas I'd like para pedir y a little con sugar.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia I like por I'd like y a few por a little con sugar.

activities.prompt: We need four sandwiches, a large salad, two bottles of water, and some fruit. Carlos does not like cheese, so there is no cheese in the sandwiches.
activities.question: What ingredient is not in the sandwiches?
activities.feedback_correct: Carlos does not like cheese, so there is no cheese.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la última oración del plan.

activities.prompt: We need four sandwiches, some fruit, and two bottles of water. No cheese, please. How much is it?
activities.feedback_correct: El plan y las preferencias se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica las cantidades como grupos y marca no cheese claramente.

activities.prompt: For a picnic, Elena buys three sandwiches, a bag of chips, some fruit, four bottles of water, and a little juice. She likes fruit, but she does not like chips.
activities.question: What does Elena not like?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice she does not like chips.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración con does not like.

activities.prompt: Write a complete plan for a meal for four people: menu, shopping list, quantities, preferences, and estimated price.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu plan conecta menú, compra, cantidades y preferencias.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa countable/uncountable nouns, quantities, I'd like y no/some.

activities.instruction: Organiza una comida completa con la IA.
activities.prompt: Plan a dinner for four people, shop for the ingredients, handle one unavailable item, and place a restaurant-style final order.
activities.role: native-speaking meal planner and shop assistant
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes manejar una situación completa de comida y compras en inglés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA adapta el menú y practica el punto exacto que necesite refuerzo.
